featureSections.cardBody: We respect your schedule and aim to finish every project on time, every time.

home.whyTitle: Why Dallas Homeowners Choose Myriad Roofing

whyChooseUs.title: Local Expertise

whyChooseUs.title: Premium Materials

whyChooseUs.title: Exceptional Craftsmanship

testimonials.quote: Myriad Roofing replaced our entire roof after a storm. The team was professional, on time, and the quality is outstanding.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: From the inspection to the final walkthrough, everything was explained clearly. I felt confident in their expertise.
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.quote: They repaired a leak that two other companies couldn't fix. Fair price and excellent workmanship.
testimonials.author: Linda R.

cta.headline: Ready to Protect Your Home?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your free roof inspection today and experience the Myriad difference.

servicesPage.intro: Myriad Roofing & Construction LLC offers a full range of roofing services tailored to Dallas homeowners. Whether you need a quick repair or a complete replacement, our certified team delivers quality and value.

services.title: Roof Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable fixes for leaks, storm damage, and wear.
services.longDescription: We diagnose and repair all types of roof issues, from missing shingles to flashing failures. Our team uses high-quality materials to restore your roof's integrity and extend its lifespan.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: Thorough assessment of damage and underlying issues.

process.title: Repair Plan
process.description: Detailed proposal with transparent pricing and timeline.

process.title: Execution
process.description: Professional repair with cleanup and final inspection.

faqs.question: How long does a typical roof repair take?
faqs.answer: Most repairs are completed within a day, depending on the extent of damage.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide prompt emergency services for urgent leaks and storm damage.

services.title: Roof Replacement
services.shortDescription: Complete roof removal and installation with top-tier materials.
services.longDescription: When your roof has reached the end of its life, our replacement service ensures a seamless transition. We handle everything from tear-off to final cleanup, using premium shingles, metal, or tile.

process.title: Removal
process.description: Safe removal of old roofing and deck inspection.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Expert installation with attention to detail and ventilation.

faqs.question: What roofing materials do you recommend?
faqs.answer: We offer asphalt shingles, metal, and tile, and help you choose based on climate and style.

faqs.question: How long does a roof replacement take?
faqs.answer: Typically 2-4 days, depending on roof size and complexity.

services.title: New Roof Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional installation for new construction or additions.
services.longDescription: For new homes or building additions, we design and install a roof that meets structural requirements and aesthetic goals. Our team coordinates with builders and ensures code compliance.

process.title: Design
process.description: Collaborate on style, color, and material selection.

process.title: Permitting
process.description: Handle all necessary permits and approvals.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Precision installation with quality checks throughout.

faqs.question: Do you work with custom home builders?
faqs.answer: Yes, we partner with builders to ensure timely, coordinated installations.

faqs.question: Can you install a roof on a complex architectural design?
faqs.answer: Absolutely, our team has experience with various roof shapes and slopes.

services.title: Storm Damage Restoration
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive repair and insurance claim assistance after storms.
services.longDescription: After hail, wind, or heavy rain, we assess damage and work with your insurance to restore your roof. We provide documentation, estimates, and expert repairs to get your home back to normal.

process.title: Emergency Tarping
process.description: Immediate protection to prevent further damage.

process.title: Restoration
process.description: Full repair or replacement with minimal hassle.

faqs.question: Will my insurance cover the damage?
faqs.answer: Most policies cover storm damage. We help document and communicate with your adjuster.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond after a storm?
faqs.answer: We prioritize storm calls and often respond within 24 hours.

about.headline: Dallas Roofing Experts Committed to Quality
about.mission: Our mission is to provide Dallas homeowners with durable, beautiful roofs through honest service and exceptional workmanship.
story: Founded by a team of roofing veterans, Myriad Roofing & Construction LLC was built on the belief that every home deserves a roof that's both strong and stunning. We saw too many homeowners get subpar work and empty promises, so we set out to change that. Starting with just a few tools and a commitment to doing things right, we've grown into a trusted name in Dallas roofing.

Today, we serve neighborhoods from Lakewood to Highland Park, treating every home like our own. Our team continues to invest in training, materials, and technology to deliver roofs that stand up to Texas weather. We're proud of the relationships we've built and the peace of mind we provide.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say, with transparent pricing and honest recommendations.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: Every nail, shingle, and seal is placed with precision and care.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction drives everything we do, from first call to final walkthrough.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve and support the Dallas area we call home.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Roof Estimate Today
contact.subheadline: Call us or fill out the form below. We'll respond within 24 hours.
